title: その瞳が見据えるもの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of Air Groove's debut finally arrives. Thanks to the strong
reputation she's already earned, she's the clear favorite to win this
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The frontmost runners are entering the homestretch! And today's
favorite, Air Groove, makes a bid for the lead!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Can she make it? Will she do it? The finish line is within reach! Will
Air Groove take the win?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And it's all over! The Empress Air Groove fails to clinch first by a
neck's length!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite a fine showing from the Empress, an even fiercer opponent
seizes the victory, leaving her to settle for second place.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Defeat... Ugh. What a pathetic performance!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No, I can't let my emotions get the best of me here. My capabilities as
an empress are simply lacking, thus leading to this failure.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'd best learn from this disgrace—refine myself until I become worthy
of my name.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Listen up. I'm enacting some changes as your client. I know we were
supposed to have the afternoon off, but we'll be holding a meeting.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We need to completely redesign the regimen in order to get superior
results.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Refusing to submit to the bitterness of defeat, Air Groove makes a
firm declaration of intent, determined to maintain her own regal
identity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I want to support her in those lofty ambitions somehow.
If I can convince her to make a few adjustments to her busy
schedule...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hey, are you listening to me? You seem to be off in your own world.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You'd better not be thinking of saying anything out of line.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: We established this from the start, correct? You'll be concerned only with providing me the most effective training regimen possible.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Or will you breach the terms of our contract, like the others?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I truly am concerned with how busy she finds herself on the daily. But
if I'm not careful, then this relationship will quickly fall apart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That evening, I am truly at a loss as I desperately try to think of what
best to do.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Former Trainer
text_block_list.text:
But if she attempts to keep up with student council activities and
tutoring, it will hinder her own growth. So please!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove has joined the student council with clear intention and
purpose. No one can have her abdicate the role but herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I realize that I have yet to ask her just why she dedicates so much
time to her extracurricular activities.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If only I could discover a little bit more behind what makes her tick...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I understand the situation. So that's why you've come to me. Mhmm.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, I could probably tell most anything you would want to know.
But that would hardly qualify as grasping her true intentions.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you really wish to be of one mind, don't you think it would be
better to have her reveal these things to you herself?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That said, I can see that you thought long and hard on her situation
before coming to me. Your sincere devotion is very clear.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In deference to that devotion, perhaps I can offer some guidance.
Follow me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Symboli Rudolf to the training grounds. There, we find Air
Groove assisting Mejiro Dober with a training session.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You could work on improving your starting acceleration. Pitch your
heels immediately and try to lead with a longer stride.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
A longer stride? I've tried stretching my legs farther, but it always
makes me lose precious speed...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Long strides require you to master a certain rhythm—one that your
body isn't used to yet. I think I can teach you something helpful.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Try marking the course at one-and-a-half-meter intervals and aim to
hit those marks as accurately as possible.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Once you get used to that distance, try upping it to 1.8 meters, and
then up to two. This exercise should help you hit that rhythm you
need.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay! Thank you for sharing that. I'll give it a try!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober has a bit of a complicated relationship with men, and as
a result has a hard time internalizing tips from the male instructors.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove was the first to notice this, and took the initiative to lend
her a helping hand.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Her instruction is one of the biggest factors behind Mejiro Dober's
success here at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: And it's not just Dober...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: There you are, Suzuka. What are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Um... Nothing, really.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I heard that the course I wanted to run today is closed for
maintenance, so I don't actually have anything to do right now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
With running off the table, nothing else came to mind? Heh... how
very like you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, I come with some good news. The student council just finished
looking into that maintenance. Part of the course is now available for
use.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh! Really?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's almost time for curfew, but knowing you, I reckon you'd go for it
even if it meant only getting in a few minutes of running.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You're right! Thank you, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka can be a bit eccentric at times, but Air Groove has a
good understanding of her personality. They speak quite frequently.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And in her role as vice president of the student council, too, she
always does everything in her power to address this academy's issues.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The entire student body feels the benefits of her efforts, and of
course, I couldn't ask for a more reliable vice president.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So, how was that? Do you think you were able to glean some of the
information you were seeking?
choice_data_list: It's left me with a lot to think about.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Very good. It's wise to avoid jumping to any premature conclusions.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I was a little concerned that she might cast her scepter aside entirely,
but I'm glad to see my fears were unfounded.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing. ...She has a maiden race coming up soon, yes? I wish you
both the best of luck.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I leave the student council office with renewed resolve, ready to
consider how I can truly help Air Groove to realize her goals.
